payload.title: Store card removed — transactional signal on a relational site
payload.body: Store is gone. Every persona already ranked it dead last. The page is a blurred placeholder with no timeline. The card occupied 12.5% of the homepage grid with zero substance. More importantly, a store is transactional by nature and the site's thesis is relational. The northstar is people clicking Connect, not purchases. This was the cleanest cut of the session.
payload.decision: Store card removed from homepage. No content loss, no persona impact.
payload.alternatives_considered: Keep as 'coming soon' teaser. Rejected — blurred placeholder has been up for weeks with no content path.
